name: Feature request

---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Adapter Request?

If this is a request for a new CLI tool adapter, please include:
- Tool name and link:
- Does it support MCP? (yes/no/unknown)
- Does it have a programmatic/pipe mode? (yes/no/unknown)
